expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Task Statuses feature decomposition",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status schema or migration",
      "description": "Add status column to tasks with default \"pending\" so tasks have persistent status.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add status column to tasks table with default \"pending\"",
        "API and models include status field",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "migrations/20260618_add_task_status.sql",
        "src/server/models/tasks.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Backend: update task status action",
      "description": "Add backend endpoint/action to update task status from list and enforce valid values.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Endpoint exists to set status",
        "Changing status persists to DB",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/routes/tasks.ts",
        "src/server/services/tasksService.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show status badge on task cards",
      "description": "Display status as badge on task cards in list view.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Badge shows pending/in progress/done",
        "Badge color matches status",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/web/components/TaskCard.tsx",
        "src/web/styles/status.css"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add status control to task rows",
      "description": "Allow changing status inline from task list (dropdown or quick actions).",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Control updates status via backend endpoint",
        "Optimistic UI updates or loading state handled",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/web/components/TaskRow.tsx",
        "src/web/hooks/useTasks.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add status filter to task list",
      "description": "Allow filtering task list by status with options All, Pending, In Progress, Done.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Filter UI present and filters results correctly",
        "Default selection is All",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/web/pages/TaskList.tsx",
        "src/web/components/Filters.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}
